# platformResourceInstallationsUpgrade

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for platformResourceInstallationsUpgrade

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = usePlatformResourceInstallationsUpgradeMutation(); mutate({ input: { pInstallationId: '<UUID>', pParams: '<JSON>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use usePlatformResourceInstallationsUpgradeMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = usePlatformResourceInstallationsUpgradeMutation();

```
